outcomes.title: Right Triangle - No Inverse
outcomes.description: Solve a right triangle (no inverse trig required).
outcomes.template:
Given the information below, solve the right triangle for all missing sides and angles.

Triangle ABC satisfies \angle A = {{A_val}}^\circ, \angle C = 90^\circ, and {{given_side_name}} = {{given_side_val}}.

Round side lengths to the nearest hundredth and angles to the nearest tenth of a degree.
